---

Is your feature request related to a problem?

Describe the problem clearly and concisely.

Example:

> I'm always frustrated when...

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like to see implemented.

## Use Case

Explain how this feature would be used and who would benefit from it.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions, workarounds, or approaches you have considered.

## Impact

What impact would this feature have?

* [ ] Improves usability
* [ ] Improves performance
* [ ] Improves accessibility
* [ ] Improves security
* [ ] Improves developer experience
* [ ] Adds new functionality

## Additional Context

Add any additional information, mockups, screenshots, references, or examples here.
